disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abrupt onset of rapid fluttering palpitations about four hours ago, constant since
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and what does it feel like?
Is the racing constant or does it come and go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started all of a sudden about four hours ago — a fast fluttering, racing feeling in my chest, and it hasn't let up since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Exertional breathlessness — short of breath on walking to the bathroom
trigger_question_examples: Does anything you do make it worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — when I got up and walked to the bathroom I was really puffed, more than normal.

trigger_question_examples: Have you felt dizzy or faint?
Have you actually passed out or come close to it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel lightheaded and a bit dizzy, especially when I move, but I haven't actually blacked out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Generalised fatigue — feeling washed out and drained
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself overall?
Do you feel more tired or drained than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely washed out and drained, like I've got no energy at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient's own impression that the pulse feels fast and irregular when self-palpated
trigger_question_examples: If you feel your pulse at your wrist, does it feel steady or irregular?
Can you count how fast it is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I feel my wrist it's really fast and jumpy — it feels like it's skipping and I can't count it properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing hypertension treated with a daily calcium-channel blocker
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had high blood pressure for a long time and I take amlodipine every day for it.

trigger_question_examples: Are you on any blood thinners or anticoagulants?
Do you take anything like warfarin, apixaban or aspirin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any blood thinners — just the one tablet for my blood pressure.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain or pressure at present
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain, pressure or tightness?
Any pain spreading to your arm, jaw or back?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have any chest pain — it's more of a fluttering and feeling drained.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and feels vulnerable because of the dizziness
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home right now?
Do you have someone who can stay with you or help if you feel worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own, and with the dizziness I feel a bit frightened being here alone.
